overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character walking through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis at night. The character navigates across a wide neon-lit intersection and continues along a sidewalk as vehicles pass by, with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit storefronts

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching the crosswalk edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past parked vehicles, approaching a wide intersection

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck parked on the street curb

entered.detail: large white box truck parked along the curb
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
rotating cylindrical hologram display showing advertisements
tall pole with traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city at night, passing a parked white delivery truck. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background while a large holographic advertisement rotates in the distance, all viewed through a hazy, rain-soaked atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow safety stripes

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto the yellow-striped crosswalk
steps off crosswalk onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the broad intersection following the yellow crosswalk markings

entered.detail: broad diagonal yellow and black stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
low orange metal barriers lining the crosswalk edge
elevated walkway spanning the street with glowing orange lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide yellow-striped crosswalk and traverses the open intersection. Low orange safety barriers line the crossing while an elevated pedestrian bridge with glowing lights spans the street ahead. The surrounding neon cityscape shifts from center to left as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside busy arterial road with overhead transit structure

events.description: green sports car drives past on the left side of the street
character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside moving traffic, approaching a traffic signal

notable_agents.action: sleek green sports car driving past on the multi-lane road
pedestrian in red pants walking in the opposite direction passes by the character

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with illuminated lights at the upcoming intersection
tall palm trees lining the distant street

segments.scene_description: Having reached the opposite side, the character continues along the sidewalk as vehicles including a green sports car drive past on the multi-lane road. The character passes a pedestrian walking the opposite way and approaches a traffic light pole, with the overhead pedestrian bridge now closer and more detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit intersection and back onto a bustling pedestrian path. It begins beside a parked white delivery truck on a wet concrete sidewalk, with towering skyscrapers and a rotating holographic advertisement looming through a hazy, rain-soaked atmosphere. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up onto a wide yellow-striped crosswalk lined with orange safety barriers, shifting the perspective of the glowing cityscape as they traverse the open intersection toward an elevated pedestrian bridge. The camera then follows the character back onto the opposite sidewalk, passing a pedestrian and a traffic light pole while a green sports car speeds past on the multi-lane road. Finally, the view closes in on the detailed architecture of the overhead bridge as the character continues their journey through the vibrant night.
